def negative_pkg_resources_used_for_runtime_version_lookup():
    rule_id = "pkg_resources_used_for_runtime_version_lookup"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "pkg_resources.get_distribution used at runtime; use importlib.metadata.version() instead."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
